summary: Make the rust-diffforge Files view splitter resizable, add syntax-colored file previews, and show bounded git diffs for modified files only.

review_items.summary: The Files explorer and preview panes are separated by a draggable VS Code-like resize handle with percent-based panel constraints and layout persistence, allowing the explorer to expand into the dominant pane while keeping a bounded preview.
Text file previews use language-aware syntax coloring for common workspace file types.
The Tauri host exposes a bounded read-only git diff command scoped to validated workspace files.
Diffs are requested only when the selected file git status is modified, not for added or untracked files.
Git diff requests reuse workspace root and child path validation, run with a timeout, and truncate large diff output before returning it to the WebView.
No database schema, migration, SQL policy, or data access change is required.

patches.summary: Render resizable Files panes with explicit percentage constraints, syntax-highlighted previews, and modified-file diff panels.
Add a read-only bounded workspace git diff Tauri command.

compatibility.notes: The change is local to the authenticated desktop Files view and native host read-only command surface.
